# True positive samples for secret detection testing.
# NOTE: Full tokens must be constructed at runtime in test scripts
# to avoid triggering GitHub Push Protection.
#
# Patterns tested:
# - AWS Access Key ID: AKIA + 16 alphanumeric
# - Slack Bot Token: xoxb- + numbers + alphanumeric
# - Stripe Secret Key: sk_live_ + 24+ alphanumeric
# - Google API Key: AIza + 35 alphanumeric
# - GitHub PAT: ghp_ + 36 alphanumeric
# - Password assignments: password = "..." (8+ chars)
#
# See tests/hooks/test-secret-patterns.sh for runtime-constructed tests.
